name: V2 - Asset Folder Creation - Property Registry Test

nodes.name: Manual Trigger
nodes.notes: Manual trigger only for Module 3A test. Do not activate automatically.

nodes.name: Read Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Reads only from Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Does not read boss sheets.

nodes.name: Select 1 Eligible Asset Row
nodes.notes: Filters Active Listing / Active Listing + CMA rows, skips rows with existing Asset Folder Link, returns only 1 row for this test.

nodes.name: Create Drive - Asset Folder
nodes.notes: Creates one folder inside Clarity V2 - Production / 02 Listing Asset Folders. Parent folder ID: 1qA-DdiVE0myBgdwvOvsemI4bwWr3cRYj

nodes.name: Prepare Registry Asset Update
nodes.notes: Prepares Asset Folder Status/Link/Last Updated/Notes update for the same Property Registry row.

nodes.name: Update Central - Property Registry
nodes.notes: Writes only to Clarity V2 - Central Database / Property Registry. Matches on Source Key.

meta.description: Creates one Google Drive asset folder for an eligible active listing from Clarity V2 Property Registry.
safety: Reads and writes only Clarity V2 Central Database / Property Registry
Does not read or write boss sheets
Creates only one folder for test mode
Skips rows with existing Asset Folder Link
Uses James-owned Clarity V2 production folder
